description_long: This is a single bed with a bold blue frame and a matching blue headboard. The bed features a blue comforter adorned with a large white star at its center, giving it a playful and modern appearance. Underneath the mattress, the frame incorporates built-in storage with two white cabinet doors and open shelving on either side, making it practical for urban living spaces. The mattress is clearly visible, topped with the comforter, and the bed sits at a standard height above the ground. The footboard is solid and blue, matching the headboard and frame. The overall design is functional and visually striking, suitable for a child's room or a contemporary apartment.
description: A blue single bed with a white star comforter, solid headboard and footboard, and built-in storage cabinets and shelves beneath the mattress.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue headboard, the white star on the comforter, and the solid blue footboard.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the built-in storage with white cabinet doors and open shelves beneath the bed, as well as the mattress and comforter.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid blue footboard and the edge of the comforter with the white star partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the storage compartments, mattress, and headboard.
